name: duplicate_config_rows
description: The config table no longer enforces a primary key and contains duplicate rows for the same key.
source_hint: Matches the duplicate-key anomaly checks in src/storage/sqlite.rs and src/cli/commands/doctor.rs.
notes: This preserves a queryable database that still violates higher-level invariants.
It exercises legacy-schema repair without needing a fully corrupt SQLite file.
